For Preference
Off Calendar May-10-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Donna J. Hitchens, Clerk Nicole Adams, Reporter Patty Dowling.

Motions for preference, CCP 36(d), granted with the following conditions.
There will be no deposition of plaintiff, as he will not be providing trial testimony. It will be indicated by Mar-28-2003 if and when plaintiff's wife will be provided for deposition. A witness list will be provided to defendants by plaintiffs' counsel on or before Mar-28-2003. Responses to discovery will be shortened to 15 days. Parties stipulate that motions for summary judgment may be heard on 15 days notice as provided for in General Order 140, and may be heard up to the date of trial.
